feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Super-Solar Metallicity and Tentative Evidence for Photochemistry on WASP-96b from JWST and Ground-Based VLT Transmission Spectroscopy
entry.content:
Authors: M Radica, J Taylor, Y Rotman, J Blecic, L Welbanks... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: With its expanded wavelength coverage and increased precision compared to previous space-based observatories, JWST provides the opportunity to revisit benchmark planets and view them in a new light. Here, we conduct an in-depth study ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Jake Taylor (author alert)

entry.title: The Search for Life on Potentially Habitable Exoplanets
entry.content:
Authors: G Arney, N Parenteau, N Hinkel, E Mamajek... - Astronomical Society of the ..., 2026

Abstract: The discovery of a biosphere on another planet would transform how we view ourselves, and our planet Earth, in relation to the rest of the cosmos. We now know Earth is one planet among eight circling our sun; our sun is part of a swirling galaxy ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

Alert: Sara Imari Walker (author alert)

entry.title: Searching for Life as We Don't Know It: Detecting Signatures of Planetary-scale Complexity in Exoplanet Atmospheric Spectra
entry.content:
Authors: S Walker, E Janin, E Shkolnik, L Slocombe - ... Society of the Pacific Conference Series, 2026

Abstract: Detecting extraterrestrial life on exoplanets is a central challenge of 21st-century astronomy. We present a new, observation-driven framework for life detection that applies Assembly Theory to exoplanet atmospheres, with the goal of revealing ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

Alert: Sara Imari Walker (author alert)

entry.title: Detecting and Characterizing Venus Analogs Orbiting Other Stars with the Habitable Worlds Observatory
entry.content:
Authors: SR Kane, EL Miles, CM Ostberg, NR Izenberg, S Blunt... - Astronomical Society of the ..., 2026

Abstract: Understanding planetary habitability requires a comparative approach anchored to the divergent evolutionary outcomes of Earth and Venus. The Habitable Worlds Observatory (HWO) will be uniquely positioned to conduct a statistical and physical ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Renyu Hu (author alert)

entry.title: Detecting Surface Liquid Water on Exoplanets
entry.content:
Authors: J Lustig-Yaeger, NB Cowan, R Hu, LC Mayorga... - Astronomical Society of the ..., 2026

Abstract: Planets with large bodies of water on their surface will have more temperate and stable climates, and such planets are the ideal places for life-as-we-know-it to arise and evolve. A key science case for the Habitable Worlds Observatory (HWO) is to ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Renyu Hu (author alert)

entry.title: Quantum coherence in neuromorphic computing
entry.content:
Authors: Y Wang, K Li, GD Scholes - The Journal of Chemical Physics, 2026

Abstract: Yuanheng Wang ORCID logo https://orcid. org/0000-0002-4683-1614 a), Kai Li ORCID logo https://orcid. org/0000-0001-7025-5314, Gregory D. Scholes ORCID logo https://orcid. org/0000-0003-3336-7960 b)

Alert: Gregory Scholes (author alert)

entry.title: Explanation, scope, and perspective: sources of schismogenesis in consciousness science
entry.content:
Authors: F Ellia, N Tsuchiya - Trends in Cognitive Sciences, 2026

Abstract: Contemporary consciousness science faces an impasse: competing theoretical frameworks—structuralist versus functionalist, universal versus local, intrinsic versus extrinsic—appear to be inducing philosophical deadlocks and conceptual standstills ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Consciousness

Alert: Naotsugu Tsuchiya (author alert)

entry.title: Testing False Positive Biosignature Scenarios with the Habitable Worlds Observatory
entry.content:
Authors: EW Schwieterman, J Krissansen-Totton... - Astronomical Society of the ..., 2026

Abstract: The search for life is one of the primary science cases for the Habitable Worlds Observatory. Important potential biosignatures include molecular oxygen (O 2) and its photochemical proxy ozone (O 3), which could signify the presence of a global ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Joshua Krissansen-Totton (author alert)

Alert: Joshua Krissansen-Totton (author alert)

entry.title: Breathing Worlds: Leveraging Seasonality for Exo-Earth Biosphere Characterization with HWO
entry.content:
Authors: ÉA Laflèche, AG Ulses, S Gilbert-Janizek, J Jernigan... - Astronomical Society of the ..., 2026

Abstract: Earth is a complex, living system that experiences significant changes over a variety of timescales, including seasonal cycles. Exo-Earths observed with the Habitable Worlds Observatory (HWO) likely experience seasons as well, but the consequences ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Joshua Krissansen-Totton (author alert)

entry.title: The central dogma in reverse
entry.content:
Authors: N Mrnjavac, WF Martin - Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, 2026

Abstract: Among all issues in early evolution, the origin of the genetic code is far and away the most poorly resolved. As such, there is no shortage of theories as to how it arose (1, 2). In PNAS, Shi et al.(3) report laboratory experiments that run counter to ...

Alert: William Martin (author alert)

entry.title: Nonthermal X-Ray Emission Associated with Supra-arcade Downflows in the Late Decay Phase of a Solar Flare
entry.content:
Authors: H Pan, AM Veronig, R Liu, Y Li, T Gou - The Astrophysical Journal, 2026

Abstract: Abstract Supra-arcade downflows (SADs)—dark, tadpole-like, sunward-moving structures observed above post-flare loops—are considered key signatures of magnetic reconnection in solar eruptions. However, their physical origin and ...

Alert: Astrid Veronig (author alert)
